mobile

Tactic.Coach

Training planning for athletes and sports clubs

Tactic.Coach is a training and planning management app for athletes and sports clubs. Coaches build sessions and programs, athletes log their workouts and track progress over time. Built with React Native (mobile), TypeScript, Strapi backend, JS scrapers for data enrichment, and a React web dashboard. Solo project built as CTO at TKorp.

react-nativetypescriptstrapireact
founder
iOSAndroid
+1
mobile
MVP2020

RetroTrip

Travel memories turned into home-delivered posters

RetroTrip delivers a personalized travel souvenir poster to your door — featuring your trip photos, GPS itinerary, and map. Users pick their travel period, select photos, and order a premium printed poster. Built from scratch as founder: React Native app, TypeScript, Strapi/Node.js backend, PHP Slim API for print order management, and a promotional website.

react-nativetypescriptstrapinodejsphp-slim
founder
mobile
2022

Trouver RDV Préfecture

Prefecture appointment finder — 70K members

Trouver RDV Préfecture helps its 70K users easily get an appointment at a French prefecture — one of the most notoriously frustrating administrative tasks. Node.js scrapers monitor availability slots across prefecture websites around the clock and send instant push notifications when a slot opens. Built with React Native, PHP backend, Node.js scrapers, and Express.js.

react-nativephpnodejs
founder70k+ users
iOS
+1
mobile
2019

MAIIA

Patient & doctor teleconsultation platform

MAIIA is two apps in one: one for patients, one for doctors. The goal is to simplify appointment booking, document sharing, and teleconsultation between patients and physicians. As Dev → Lead Dev → Engineering Manager at Cegedim Santé over 4 years, I led a team of 10 React Native developers and test engineers. Stack: React Native, TypeScript, Java backend, WebSockets, React front. The app reached 50K+ active users during the COVID-19 period.

react-nativetypescriptjavawebsocketsreact
lead-dev50k+ users
iOSAndroidWeb
+5
mobile
2019

eScoot

Electric scooter aggregator — 100K users, sold in 2021

eScoot aggregates all electric scooter brands in your city into a single map. Created in 2019, the app reached 100K members and was acquired in 2021. It solved the fragmentation of urban micro-mobility by integrating multiple operator APIs, letting users find and compare available scooters from one place. Built with React Native (Expo), Node.js scrapers, and a PHP storefront.

react-nativeexponodejsphp
founder100k+ users
Android
+2
mobile
2024

Alerte Naturalisation

Get notified the moment your French naturalization is published

Alerte Naturalisation France automatically scans the Official Journal of the French Republic (Journal Officiel) every day and sends a push notification the instant your naturalization is published. Enter your prefecture file number once, then forget about manually checking — the app handles it. Serves thousands of people awaiting French citizenship confirmation.

react-nativeexpotypescriptnodejs
founder200+ users
iOSAndroid
mobile
MVP2019

PushX

Receive mobile push notifications simply via API

PushX is an API to receive mobile push notifications simply — from any webhook, API call, or external service — directly in the PushX mobile app. Think of it as a personal notification inbox for developers. Built with React Native (Expo) for the mobile client and a Strapi/JS backend for token management and delivery routing.

react-nativeexpostrapinodejs
founder
iOSAndroid
mobile
MVP2023

Horizon

Gamified addiction management

Horizon is a gamified addiction management app that helps users track and gradually reduce addictive behaviors — alcohol, tobacco, screens, gambling, and more. A radar chart visualizes the user's overall balance across addiction categories, and daily streaks and achievements make the process motivating rather than clinical. Built with React Native, PHP backend, Node.js scrapers for enrichment, and Express.js.

react-nativephpnodejs
founder
iOS
+2
mobile
2024

Paris Toilet Finder

Find public restrooms across Paris instantly

Paris Toilet Finder WC Locator helps tourists, families, and locals find the nearest public restroom in Paris using GPS and an interactive map. Coverage includes toilets near the Eiffel Tower, Louvre, metro stations, parks, and shopping districts. Simple, fast, and free — because finding a WC in Paris should never be stressful.

react-nativeexpotypescript
founder100+ users
iOS
+2
mobile
2024

Paris Water Map

Find free water fountains and refill stations in Paris

Paris Water Map helps tourists, runners, and locals locate every public water fountain and refill station across Paris — including iconic Wallace fountains and modern eco-refill points. Find the nearest water spot in real time, plan hydration stops on your route, and reduce plastic waste. Free and built with React Native and Expo.

react-nativeexpotypescript
founder100+ users
iOS
wearable
MVP2025

Elegant Paris Watch Face

Timeless Parisian sophistication on your Garmin

Elevate your wrist with this refined digital timepiece inspired by classic French elegance. Featuring a deep black dial, signature orange accents, softly rounded Roman numerals at every hour, crisp white hands, and a stylish date window — a perfect blend of understated luxury and modern clarity. Optimized for AMOLED and high-resolution MIP displays, always-on friendly and extremely battery-efficient thanks to clean vector rendering. A discreet "Paris" signature completes the look.

connect-iqmonkey-c
founder
Web
wearable
MVP2025

Paris WC: GPS Toilet Finder

Find the nearest public restroom in Paris from your Garmin watch

A Garmin smartwatch app that locates the 5 nearest public toilets in Paris using GPS. Features an intelligent directional arrow, real-time distance updates, and 451 pre-loaded locations from official Paris data. Filter by accessibility (PMR) or 24h availability. Works fully offline — no phone or internet required, even underground or in airplane mode. Optimized for round AMOLED screens.

connect-iqmonkey-c
founder
Web
+2
mobile
MVP2022

ChronoClub

Race timing app for sports coaches and PE teachers

ChronoClub streamlines race timing for sports coaches and physical education teachers. Record finish times as athletes arrive, then assign each time to the right athlete after the race — no paper, no chaos. Export and share results with the whole group in one tap. Built with React Native and Expo.

react-nativeexpotypescript
founder
iOSAndroid
+1
mobile
MVP2023

RUNinTWO

Race bib marketplace between athletes

RUNinTWO is an app dedicated to buying and selling race bibs (dossards) between athletes. Available on iOS & Android since June 2023. Sellers post their bibs for events they can no longer attend, buyers get them instantly — often last-minute. Built from scratch as founder and sole developer. Real-time messaging via WebSockets, geolocation search, push notifications via Expo, and a Strapi/Node.js backend.

react-nativeexpotypescriptstrapinodejswebsockets

iOSAndroid
